title: Sparkling Animation
description: A modpack I used to spice up my everyday vanilla experience. You may find it good, you may find it bad, just test it out.
body:
Sparkling Animation breathes vibrant life into your vanilla gameplay with carefully optimized visual enhancements. Expect fluid new animations, immersive 3D textures, and subtle environmental details, all crafted to run smoothly without sacrificing performance. Every element is carefully balanced to elevate immersion while keeping your gameplay smooth, even on mid-tier hardware.

Beyond visuals, the pack thoughtfully enhances daily adventures with practical quality-of-life features like an integrated mini-map. I’m committed to its development; As I discover new mods that meaningfully improve visuals or quality-of-life, they’ll be added through regular updates. This ensures your experience stays fresh, intuitive, and polished.

If you have any issues, please reach out my [Discord](https://discord.gg/DWDefHgdJ8). Thank you!
